zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Multon於大約1230年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Conan de Multon21歲，母親Ada De Moreville18歲。她和Richard Bacon至少有5個兒子。她去世於1276年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Multon于大约1230年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Conan de Multon21岁，母亲Ada De Moreville18岁。她和Richard Bacon至少有5个儿子。她去世于1276年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Multon was born about 1230, in Norfolk, England, her father, Conan de Multon, was 21 and her mother, Ada De Moreville, was 18. She had at least 5 sons with Richard Bacon. She died in 1276, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Multon est née environ 1230, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Conan de Multon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ada De Moreville, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Richard Bacon. Elle est décédée en 1276, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Multon um 1230 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conan de Multon 21 und ihre Mutter Ada De Moreville 18. Sie hatte mit Richard Bacon mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1276 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Multon è nata il circa 1230 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Conan de Multon, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Ada De Moreville, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con Richard Bacon. Morì nel 1276, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Multonが約1230年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Conan de Multonは21歳，母Ada De Morevilleは18歳であった。彼女はRichard Baconとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1276年にフランスピカーディソンメで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Multon(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conan de Multon(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada De Moreville(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Richard Bacon(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Multon nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Conan de Multon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ada De Moreville, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Richard Bacon. Ela faleceu em 1276, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Multon родилась около 1230 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Conan de Multon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ada De Moreville, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Richard Bacon. Она умерла в 1276 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Multon nació aproximadamente 1230, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Conan de Multon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ada De Moreville, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Richard Bacon. Murió en 1276, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
